// 01 - METHOD

A career, broken into daily compiles.

No tutorial hell. No 8-hour videos. Just a relentless daily loop.

Smart Onboarding

Diagnostic in 90 seconds. Skill map. Target role.

AI Roadmap

Personalized 8-step path based on your level.

Daily Practice

DSA, SQL, system design. Run code in browser.

Mock Tests

Monthly exams with analytics.

// 02 - TRACKS

Pick your weapon.

SDE • BACKEND

Java, Go, system design, distributed systems

FRONTEND ENG

React, TS, performance, browser internals

DATA / ML

Python, SQL, stats, LLM ops

MOBILE

iOS, Android, RN — system + UX

DEVOPS / SRE

K8s, observability, incident response

FULLSTACK

From DB to deployment
